title: Search infra issue ERR_SEA_7265
description: Intermittent search timeouts and failures observed by users hitting /api/search; cache miss pattern and thread contention during peak queries.
root_cause: Thread-pool exhaustion due to heavy parallel index refresh + stale cache leading to NPE in request handler
resolution_steps: Restarted search-service gracefully
Flush local search cache and validated TTLs
Scaled search replicas from 3 -> 5
Applied circuit-breaker to upstream index requests
Added request-level timeouts and alert rule for queue length
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-09-21T16:00:34.189Z ERROR SearchService [reqId=78fabc12] NullPointerException at SearchHandler.handle(SearchHandler.java:112)
2025-09-21T16:00:34.190Z WARN SearchService ThreadPool-5 queue-size=153; active=48; max=50
2025-09-21T16:00:35.005Z INFO RetryPolicy Retrying request (policy=exp-backoff, attempt=2)

title: Inventory infra issue ERR_INV_7949
description: Inventory API returning intermittent timeouts and authentication retries to DB observed; auth handshake sometimes fails causing connection churn.
root_cause: Transient auth token expiry and connection pool misconfiguration causing repeated re-auth and timeout.
resolution_steps: Rotate affected auth keys
Increase DB pool max connections from 50 -> 100
Add token-caching layer with 5m TTL
Restart inventory-service after pool resize
Monitor 5xx rate for 24h
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-08-16T02:22:34.189Z ERROR InventoryService [req=aa23] DBConnectionTimeout: could not get connection in 30s
2025-08-16T02:22:34.190Z WARN AuthClient token fetch failed (status=502)
2025-08-16T02:22:35.004Z INFO PoolManager resizing pool to 80

title: Inventory bug issue ERR_INV_1189
description: Repeated cache invalidation bugs causing stale reads and occasional duplicate order allocations.
root_cause: Race condition in cache invalidation callback producing stale inventory reads.
resolution_steps: Apply fix to cache invalidation handler to use compare-and-swap
Backfill corrected inventory snapshots
Invalidate caches cluster-wide with version token
Add unit tests for concurrent invalidation
Release hotfix v2.1.3
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-10-17T06:11:34.189Z ERROR InventoryCache [req=cb7] CacheInvalidationRaceException at CacheManager.invalidate(CacheManager.java:88)
2025-10-17T06:11:34.240Z INFO InventoryService Returning cached value older-than 5m
2025-10-17T06:12:01.005Z INFO Reconciler started jobId=inv-reconcile-20251017

title: Inventory performance issue ERR_INV_9792
description: Inventory queries experiencing elevated p95 latency during batch reindex jobs and during deployments.
root_cause: Background reindex combined with insufficient DB read replicas; query plans show full table scans.
resolution_steps: Throttle reindex jobs to off-peak hours
Add read replicas and update connection routing
Optimize slow SQL and add indexes
Enable query sampling alerts
Schedule maintenance window for reindex
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-11-24T00:31:34.189Z WARN InventoryReindex Job[20251124] high CPU 88%
2025-11-24T00:31:35.003Z ERROR SQLExecutor slow query detected duration=4500ms; query="select * from inventory where updated_at > ?"
2025-11-24T00:31:36.006Z INFO Autoscaler scaled replicas +2

title: Payments data issue ERR_PAY_9226
description: Payment processing failures where payloads lost on queue handoff causing partial payments and reconciliation mismatches.
root_cause: Message queue ack mis-handled during high I/O causing dropped events.
resolution_steps: Restarted queue broker and processed dead-letter queue
Enable at-least-once delivery for payments topic
Add idempotency keys to payment processor
Run reconciliation script to reconcile missing payments
Add monitoring for queue lag and DLQ size
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-09-24T18:39:34.189Z ERROR PaymentWorker [msgId=pay-993] Failed to ack message due to BrokerIOException
2025-09-24T18:39:34.400Z WARN MQClient re-queued message attempt=1
2025-09-24T18:40:01.110Z INFO Reconciler matched 12 missing transactions

title: Payments config issue ERR_PAY_7873
description: Misconfigured payment gateway timeout defaults caused increased client timeouts and retries.
root_cause: Config drift: different timeout defaults across deployment groups causing cascading retries.
resolution_steps: Rollback to last known-good config
Standardize gateway timeout to 10s across envs
Deploy config as immutable artifact
Add config drift detector job
Document config values in DOC-202
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-08-06T05:16:34.189Z WARN PaymentsConfigManager found mismatch env=prod vs env=canary gateway.timeout=5s vs 20s
2025-08-06T05:17:01.005Z INFO Rolling back canary changes
2025-08-06T05:20:12.110Z INFO Restarted payments-service with standardized config

title: Catalog performance issue ERR_CAT_5887
description: Catalog service p95 latency spike impacting browse and search faceting, causing checkout friction.
root_cause: Memory leak in product cache loader causing OOM and GC pressure.
resolution_steps: Restart catalog-service instances
Roll out memory-fix v3.2.1
Increase heap to absorb traffic during patch
Run heap-dump analysis and fix leak
Add GC and OOM alerts to Ops dashboard
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-07-16T13:28:34.189Z ERROR JVM [pid=1234] OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space
2025-07-16T13:28:34.500Z WARN GC concurrent-mark-sweep pause=820ms
2025-07-16T13:30:03.001Z INFO HeapDump saved to /var/dumps/heap-20250716.hprof

title: Search bug issue ERR_SEA_6258
description: Search returned inconsistent results after rolling index update; relevancy degraded for subset of queries.
root_cause: Index schema mismatch after partial migration caused missing fields in documents.
resolution_steps: Rollback faulty index migration
Rebuild index with correct schema
Add migration pre-checks
Add integration tests for index migration
Publish step-by-step migration runbook (DOC-700)
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-11-15T08:36:34.189Z ERROR IndexMigrator FieldMappingException: field 'title' missing for docId=ab12
2025-11-15T08:36:35.003Z WARN Rolling restart in progress node=search-3
2025-11-15T08:38:02.101Z INFO Reindex job started jobId=reindex-1115

title: Auth config issue ERR_AUT_7278
description: Auth service returned intermittent 401s after a recent config change to token lifetime.
root_cause: Config change shortened token TTL causing tokens to expire mid-session and race on renewal.
resolution_steps: Revert token TTL to previous value
Notify clients of TTL change
Add graceful token renewal flow
Sync all auth servers clocks and timezones
Add canary testing for auth config changes
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-07-19T01:35:34.189Z WARN AuthService token validation failed user=usr987 reason=expired
2025-07-19T01:35:35.004Z INFO TokenService issuing new token for user=usr987
2025-07-19T01:40:00.100Z INFO Canary auth-server passed health checks
